About Asiri

Academic director, entrepreneur, and global connector.

Over the years, I have founded multiple brands across the UK and Sri Lanka, serving clients in more than 14 countries while helping individuals grow through skill development, business innovation, and international pathways.

Driven by the Learn Do Rise philosophy, my mission is to empower people to learn continuously, take action fearlessly, and rise with purpose.

From education and consulting to business development and innovation, my vision is to bridge opportunities between the UK, Sri Lanka, and emerging international markets.

My Philosophy Learn. Do. Rise.
Services by Asiri

What I can do for you.

Book a free call to discuss your goals, ideas, and opportunities. We will explore the right route and turn it into a clear action plan.

01
Study with me

Study online - UK Level 3 to 7.

Study business management, hospitality and tourism, health and social care, IT, and English through flexible online programmes with professional support.

  • Study from anywhere
  • Flexible learning schedules
  • Career-focused certification
  • Personalised study support
  • Learning materials access
  • Skill development guidance
Enrol Now
Free enrolment call Business, hospitality, health care, IT, and English courses.
02
International universities

Apply to study at international universities.

Take the next step toward international education with personalised support from application to enrolment, based on your academic goals and destination.

  • USA, Canada, and UK
  • Europe and France
  • Australia and New Zealand
  • Malta and Malaysia
  • Course matching
  • Application support
Apply Now
Global pathways Support from course choice through enrolment.
03
Work abroad

Apply to work abroad with trusted guidance.

Start your international career journey with expert support for applications, documents, preparation, and suitable employer connections.

  • Health and care workers
  • Office and admin jobs
  • IT opportunities
  • Construction workers
  • Middle East roles
  • Application preparation
Find My Role
Career call UK, Middle East, and international placement routes.
04
Recruitment

Let me recruit workers for your business.

Connect with skilled, qualified, and experienced professionals to support business growth across healthcare, construction, admin, hospitality, and service sectors.

  • Healthcare professionals
  • Construction workforce
  • Admin support staff
  • Hospitality workers
  • Pre-vetted candidates
  • UK and EU employers
Share Vacancy
Business support Reliable manpower matched to your goals.
05
Paralegal services

Structured paralegal and legal support.

Detail-oriented support for legal professionals and clients with accurate research, drafting, documentation, and case preparation.

  • Legal document drafting
  • Contract review
  • Legal research
  • Case law analysis
  • Legal correspondence
  • File organisation
Enquire Now
Legal support Research, drafting, review, and administration.
